form.label: Connector Activity
form.description: Splunk-local connector traffic, hook activity, verdicts, and identity coverage for the demo image.

search.query: `defenseclaw_demo_connector_events` | where connector!="(unknown)" AND ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") | stats dc(connector) as active_connectors
`defenseclaw_demo_connector_events` | where "$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$" | stats count as connector_events
`defenseclaw_demo_connector_events` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND (decision="block" OR like(action, "%block%")) | stats count as blocks

`defenseclaw_demo_connector_events` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND (decision="confirm" OR like(action, "%confirm%") OR like(action, "%approval%")) | stats count as confirms
`defenseclaw_demo_connector_events` | where "$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$" | timechart span=15m count by connector limit=10 useother=t
`defenseclaw_demo_connector_events` | where "$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$" | stats count by connector decision | sort - count | head 20

`defenseclaw_demo_connector_events` | where connector!="(unknown)" AND ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") | stats count as events dc(run_id) as runs dc(session_id) as sessions values(event_name) as event_names values(decision) as decisions values(severity) as severities by connector | sort - events | head 20

`defenseclaw_demo_connector_events` | where "$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$" | stats count as events values(connector) as connectors values(decision) as decisions by target | sort - events | head 20

`defenseclaw_demo_connector_events` | where "$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$" | table timestamp connector event_name decision severity run_id session_id target message | sort - timestamp | head 50
